A strategic and well-located place, a little difficult to access when there is a lot of traffic.

reviews.comment:
Fui a las 22:20 a comprar dos tostados y dos cafes, y de mala manera la cajera me dice que a las 23 hs cerraban, y que ya había guardado todas las mesas. No paraba de revolear los ojos. Muy desganada 🤦🏾‍♀️

(Translated by Google)
I went at 10:20 PM to buy two toasted sandwiches and two coffees, and the cashier rudely told me they closed at 11:00 PM and that she had already booked all the tables. She kept rolling her eyes. Very unenthusiastic 🤦🏾‍♀️
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12748059352839021938/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtOTl1ZXpRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Estación de servicio del automóvil club argentino, ubicada en el cento de Villa Gesell. Buena atención, playeros amables y atentos. Aceptan todas las tarjetas de crédito y mercado pago. Recomendable

(Translated by Google)
Argentine Automobile Club service station, located in the center of Villa Gesell. Good service, friendly and attentive attendants. They accept all major credit cards and Mercado Pago. Highly recommended.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12748059352839021938/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtaTc3NUZnEAE

reviews.comment:
Cargué combustible y tomé café afuera. Lindo lugar. Agradable. Poca gente. Más en el predio hermoso del recreo. Buena atencion y económico.

(Translated by Google)
I filled up with gas and had coffee outside. Nice place. Pleasant. Not crowded. More so in the beautiful recreation area. Good service and inexpensive.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12748059352839021938/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtcy1hTXFnRRAB

reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
Buena atención de los chicos, lo único, que la gente quiere cargar combustible, y comprar en el.shopping. Pero al terminar de llenar el tanque se quedan esperando y la cola de carga se hace más larga. Pensar que todos estamos en modo vacaciones. Pero no nos da derecho de perjudicar al otro

(Translated by Google)
The service is good, but people want to fill up their tanks and shop at the mall. But when they're done filling up, they're left waiting, and the line gets longer. It's hard to imagine we're all on vacation. But that doesn't give us the right to harm others.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12748059352839021938/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJeGFiQ3lRRRAB
